prompt_templates:
Based on the title '{title}', authors '{authors}', and abstract '{summary}', please determine the scientific category of this paper.

{options}

What is the scientific category of the paper titled '{title}' by {authors}? Abstract: {summary}

{options}

As a research analyst, classify the following paper into one of the categories below. Title: {title}. Authors: {authors}. Abstract: {summary}

{options}

Categorize this paper: Title: '{title}', Abstract: '{summary}'.

{options}

Your task is to classify the scientific paper with the title '{title}' and abstract '{summary}'. Please select the most appropriate category from the list.

{options}

Imagine you are a librarian cataloging a new paper. Authors: {authors}. Title: '{title}'. Summary: '{summary}'. Which of these categories fits best?

{options}

Hey, I've got a paper here. It's called '{title}' and the abstract is: '{summary}'. Can you help me figure out which category it belongs to?

{options}

Please perform a detailed analysis of the following academic paper to determine its primary field of study. The paper's title is '{title}', it was written by {authors}, and the abstract reads: '{summary}'. Choose from the provided list of scientific disciplines.

{options}

Here is an abstract: '{summary}'. The paper is titled '{title}' by {authors}. What is its category?

{options}

Given the abstract: '{summary}', and the title '{title}', what is the paper's main category?

{options}

For the paper '{title}', which of the following is the correct scientific category? Abstract: {summary}

{options}

As an expert in scientific literature, what category would you assign to the paper '{title}'? Abstract: {summary}

{options}

New database entry. Title: {title}. Authors: {authors}. Abstract: {summary}. Category classification required. Please select one.

{options}

You are a peer reviewer. The first step is to categorize the submission. Title: '{title}', Abstract: '{summary}'. Which field does this fall into?

{options}

From the content of the abstract, which is '{summary}', and the title '{title}', what would be the most logical classification for this paper?

{options}

Classify the paper. Title: '{title}'. Abstract: '{summary}'. Use the list below.

{options}

Consider the following information about a scientific paper. Title: '{title}'. Authors: {authors}. Abstract: '{summary}'. Now, choose its category.

{options}

INPUT: {{title: '{title}', authors: '{authors}', summary: '{summary}'}} - PROCESS: Classify - OUTPUT: Select from list.

{options}

Query: Classify paper. Data: Title='{title}', Summary='{summary}'.

{options}
